utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ohh , I mean it is just so realistic !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: I know . Yeah , his name is Pat .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Pat the dog . Oh ! Oh ! I get it ! !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Do you uh , do you ... ready for a refill ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , I probably should not ... so I will ! Oh ! Wow ! It is like it is raining !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: But if you are thinking you can put a fish in there and it would not get sucked up into the mechanism , well you would be wrong .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Umm , can I use your bathroom ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: It is uh , right through there .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay . God you know , if someone told me a week ago that I would be peeing in Joey Tribbiani apartment

emotion_cause.span: 10_if someone told me a week ago that I would be peeing in Joey Tribbiani apartment

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah , life pretty great is not it ?
